acceptedAnswer.text: ChatGPT updates lawyer recommendations quarterly via web scrapes; LA changes reflect in 1-3 months post-SEO.

suggestedAnswer.text: Model cutoffs vary—test post-updates. LA's dynamic market needs ongoing work.
